text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Phew! That's it for praying today.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I've been kinda off my game lately, so hopefully
this will bring me some luck.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: CHECK!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
What was that? That voice sounded really
familiar...

text_block_list.name: Shogi Master of the Shopping District
text_block_list.text:
For starters, that's a bishop, not a lance. And this
is shogi, not chess. Here we say... Oute!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: UGHHH! I lost again!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Hey, if it isn't the stationary shop owner and
Bakushin O. How are you guys doing?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
You defeated me! ME! The genius! You must've
been a famously hard-working student as well!

text_block_list.name: Shogi Master of the Shopping District
text_block_list.text:
Bwahaha! It's been half a century since I was a
student! Natie is really good at this game too, by
the way.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Ohoho, we'll see about that! Nature! I challenge
you to a game of shogi!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Now hold on! I just played a bit when I was a kid!
And it was just against customers at my mom's
bar!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Besides, I don't want to waste my trainer's time...
choice_data_list:
But if you win this, we can start the day on a
high note.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Oooh. You're good, Trainer. Now I've gotta win.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, their battle begins atop the shogi board.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
(Hmmm... It looks like I can end this in about two
more turns. It all depends on whether I sacrifice
this piece or not.)

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...This is it!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Aaand... Oute!

text_block_list.name: Shogi Master of the Shopping District
text_block_list.text: Ah, you win! You're really good, Natie!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: What a graceful play! I salute you!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I don't know what to say to such straightforward
compliments.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
You have to face me next, Nature! This time, I'll
definitely win!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: What?! But you said only one game...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Geez, okay. I'll do it for you, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Nice Nature also wins the next game handily!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Ughhh... You win!

text_block_list.name: Shogi Master of the Shopping District
text_block_list.text:
Gyahaha! You tripped up in the last turn! It seems
you weren't confident enough in your move.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
My mind is a bit foggy today... I guess it's not that
easy for me to get back into the groove.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Nature! When in doubt, all you have to do is...
Bakushin!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Huh? I've got to do what now?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
You just have to Bakushin ahead with the lance
piece! Bakushin!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Well, actually, that does beat sitting around and
second-guessing yourself... I guess.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nice Nature plays another game... but she loses
her king to her opponent's bishop.
